project.name: ArtisanDoors
project.description: Luxury bespoke door studio e-commerce demo — production-quality frontend with mock backend, 8 pages, full user flows, premium animations

tasks.title: Extract design system from reference-design.md
tasks.description: Define color tokens, typography scale, spacing, border-radius, card styles, button styles, glassmorphic effects, dark/light section patterns
tasks.acceptance: All CSS custom properties, component base styles, and motion tokens documented

tasks.title: Define component inventory
tasks.description: Catalog every component needed across all 8 pages: variants, states, responsive behavior, animation intent (what should be motion-ready)
tasks.acceptance: Every UI element has a component entry with props, variants, states, and animation notes

tasks.title: Define tech implementation spec
tasks.description: Library choices with implementation details — how Framer Motion blur animations work, Lenis setup, Radix usage, React Hook Form patterns, cart context architecture
tasks.acceptance: Implementation guidance for every major technical pattern

tasks.title: Define user flows and page map
tasks.description: Page map, navigation structure, user journeys (browse→cart→checkout→confirmation), form logic, filter/sort behavior, cart operations
tasks.acceptance: Every user path documented with page transitions and state changes

tasks.title: Create visual design preview
tasks.description: Self-contained HTML file previewing the design system: colors, typography, card styles, button states, component samples
tasks.acceptance: Opens in browser and shows a visual reference of the design system

tasks.title: Scaffold project and build all frontend components/pages
tasks.description: Initialize Next.js 15, install dependencies, configure Tailwind v4, set up project structure. Build all components motion-ready (motion.div elements, AnimatePresence wrappers, refs). Build all 8 pages with layouts. Create mock product data. Implement cart context with localStorage.
tasks.acceptance: All 8 pages render with correct layout, components are motion-ready, mock data populates shop/product pages, cart operations work

tasks.title: Build mock API layer and data models
tasks.description: Define TypeScript types/interfaces for products, collections, cart items, orders. Create mock data files with 6-12 products. Build utility functions for filtering, sorting, searching products. Build cart logic (add, remove, update quantity, calculate totals with option modifiers). Build order creation (generate order number, store in localStorage). Build form handling utilities.
tasks.acceptance: All data types defined, mock data created, cart logic works, order flow works end-to-end with localStorage

tasks.title: Wire frontend to data layer
tasks.description: Connect components to mock data and cart context. Wire up product filtering/sorting on shop page. Connect product detail customization to price calculation. Hook up cart page to cart context. Wire checkout form to order creation. Connect order confirmation to order data. Ensure all user flows work end-to-end.
tasks.acceptance: Full user journey works: browse → filter → product detail → customize → add to cart → cart → checkout → order confirmation

tasks.title: Enhance animations and micro-interactions
tasks.description: Fine-tune blur-char/word scroll reveal timing and easing. Tune sticky card scroll behavior. Polish navbar show/hide transitions. Add page transition animations. Add hover/focus/tap micro-interactions on cards, buttons, links. Add scroll-triggered animations on shop, product, about, contact pages. Ensure prefers-reduced-motion is respected throughout.
tasks.acceptance: All animations feel premium and smooth, consistent motion language across all pages, reduced-motion fallbacks work

tasks.title: Write and run tests
tasks.description: Write component tests, integration tests for cart flow, form validation tests, page rendering tests. Run all tests and report results.
tasks.acceptance: Test suite passes, TEST_REPORT.md documents coverage and results

tasks.title: Security, performance, a11y, SEO audit
tasks.description: Four audit passes: security (XSS, injection, localStorage handling), performance (bundle size, image optimization, Core Web Vitals), accessibility (ARIA, color contrast, keyboard nav, screen readers), SEO (meta tags, semantic HTML, Open Graph, structured data).
tasks.acceptance: AUDIT_REPORT.md with categorized findings, severity levels, and fix recommendations

tasks.title: Address critical and warning issues from quality phase
tasks.description: Read TEST_REPORT.md and AUDIT_REPORT.md. Fix all critical issues and as many warnings as practical. Re-run tests if fixes are substantial.
tasks.acceptance: All critical issues resolved, no test regressions

tasks.title: Final build and delivery
tasks.description: Run next build, fix any build errors. Present final status, summary of what was built, remaining warnings, and local run instructions.
tasks.acceptance: Project builds successfully with no errors
